message:
feat(monitor): solve self-defeating prophecy in prediction scorecard

Fix the fundamental flaw where successful interventions were naively
scored as false alarms, gradually suppressing all predictions:

- Introduce PredictionOutcome enum: Inactive, Realized, Intervened,
  FalseAlarm — replacing the old (bool, bool) tuple ring buffer
- record() now takes 3 params: was_actionable, was_realized, cleanup_ran
- false_alarm_rate() excludes Intervened outcomes from the denominator
- dynamic_min_confidence() raises threshold when false alarm rate is high

Daemon integration (loop_main.rs):
- Track last_tick_cleanup_ran across all pressure-triggered cleanup paths
  (ballast release, scan dispatch, predictive ballast release at Green)
- Pass cleanup_ran to scorecard.record() each tick
- Use dynamic_min_confidence() for prediction gating threshold

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
